result.stdout:
Description:
  hyprwt - Git worktree manager

Usage:
  hyprwt [command] [options]

Options:
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information
  --version       Show version information

Commands:
  cl, clean, cleanup, del, delete, prune, remove, rm  Clean up worktrees
  cfg, conf, config                                   Manage configuration settings
  list, ls                                            List all worktrees in the current repository
  checkout, co, go, goto, sw, switch <branch>         Switch to or create a worktree for a branch

  cfg, conf, config                                   Manage configuration settings
  list, ls                                            List all worktrees in the current repository
  checkout, co, go, goto, sw, switch <branch>         Switch to or create a worktree for a branch

result.stdout:
Description:
  Manage configuration settings

Usage:
  hyprwt config [options]

Options:
  --show          Show current configuration
  --edit          Edit configuration
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

commands.command: checkout, co, go, goto, sw, switch
commands.helpInvocation: checkout, co, go, goto, sw, switch --help

result.stdout:
Description:
  Switch to or create a worktree for a branch

Usage:
  hyprwt switch <branch> [options]

Arguments:
  <branch>  Branch name or path

Options:
  -fb, --from, --from-branch <from>                                Source branch/commit to create from
  -tm, --term, --terminal <Cursor|Echo|Inplace|Tab|VSCode|Window>  Terminal mode [default: Window]
  -ai, --after-init <after-init>                                   Command to run after init script
  --dir <dir>                                                      Custom directory path
  -y, --skip, --yes                                                Auto confirm actions, eg; branch creation, deletion, etc.
  -?, -h, --help                                                   Show help and usage information

  -ai, --after-init <after-init>                                   Command to run after init script
  --dir <dir>                                                      Custom directory path
  -y, --skip, --yes                                                Auto confirm actions, eg; branch creation, deletion, etc.
  -?, -h, --help                                                   Show help and usage information

commands.command: cl, clean, cleanup, del, delete, prune, remove, rm
commands.helpInvocation: cl, clean, cleanup, del, delete, prune, remove, rm --help

result.stdout:
Description:
  Clean up worktrees

Usage:
  hyprwt cleanup [options]

Options:
  -m, --mode <All|GitHub|Interactive|Merged|Remoteless>  Determine which worktrees to remove [default: Interactive]
  -d, --dry-run                                          Show what would be removed, but don't actually remove anything
  -f, --force                                            Force removal of worktrees and branches even with uncommitted/unpushed changes
  -y, --skip, --yes                                      Auto confirm actions, eg; branch creation, deletion, etc.
  -?, -h, --help                                         Show help and usage information

  -y, --skip, --yes                                      Auto confirm actions, eg; branch creation, deletion, etc.
